programme.desc: Get ready to LOL with Charlotte McKinney, as she brings you the Top 15 most Laugh-Tastic videos of all time!

programme.title: Always Funny Fest
programme.desc: Welcome to the Always Funny Fest, your one stop shop for all things hilarious!

programme.title: Ron Ruhman
programme.desc: Ron has been called a “High Energy Seinfeld”. He brings a very energetic style to the stage as he shares his interesting slant on day-to-day life in an act that is clean, smart, and very entertaining.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Paul was raised as a sports fanatic in the tiny town of Owego, in upstate New York. After four years of playing college basketball, somehow he graduated. Aside from playing in the NBA, his dream job was to talk about sports for a living. Paul then moved to California after landing a television sports anchor job but found out quickly that he was “too much of a smart-ass” for TV news. After he was fired, Paul took his unique sense of humor to comedy club stages all over the country. In 2005, Paul was selected to perform at the HBO Comedy Festival in Las Vegas. Morrissey has also been a finalist in several national comedy competitions including Wendy's Comedy Challenge, Comedy Central's Open Mic Fight and Maxim's Real Men of Comedy.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Jonnie W: Not My Cup of Tea
programme.desc: Jonnie W addresses the Tennessee-born stereotype. Whether or not he matches up to it, his voiced inner monologue is sure to leave you on his side when it comes to new country radio, double decker grave plots, and the difference between fish and beef.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Mike Burton delivers his comedy with high energy, great storytelling, and hilarious facial expressions. Mike started his stand-up comedy career in 1996 first performing in the local clubs in NYC, then gaining nationwide popularity. He has been on TV shows, independent feature films, and commercials for HP and Modells. Mike has also performed in daytime shows: Rachel Ray, The Chew, and ABC's The Revolution.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Half-Persian and raised in a religious family, K-Von's comedy unites sharp cultural riffs with clean delivery. In this special he takes on political correctness, cyber bullying, and the utility of cargo pants.

programme.title: Ty Barnett
programme.desc: Ty Barnett, a Chicago native, got his start at Seattle's Comedy Underground. Whoopi Goldberg called Ty “hilarious” and reviewers have said he is “thought provoking” and “edgy”. All this praise earned him many television appearances. He hosted the Food Network's Mealin' and Dealin', Discovery Family's Babies Behaving Badly and Beasts Behaving Badly, and appeared in over 15 national commercials. It all began when he was one of the two finalists on the most-watched and Emmy nominated season of Last Comic Standing. Ty went on to multiple Tonight Show appearances where Jay Leno called Ty “one of the funniest comedians working”. He also appeared in HBO's Bad Boys of Comedy, his own Comedy Central Presents and one-hour special Issues. Ty was named “one to watch” by the Hollywood Reporter. He's also been seen on the sitcoms Samantha Who, Til Death, Life in Pieces, NickMom Night Out and Tosh.O. His comedy album, Grown Man-Baby Steps is a favorite on Sirius XM.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Tom Simmons: Peace, Love and Whatnot

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: With his Sharp Delivery, quick wit, and unique style, Mike Toomey has been a favorite at comedy clubs and special events since 1982. A Daily performer on The WGN Morning News in Chicago, Mike has appeared in concert with such names as George Carlin, Wayne Newton, Crosby, Stills & Nash, and Reba McIntyre. He has performed on numerous television programs including HBO's U.S. Comedy Arts Festival in Aspen Colorado MTV's Half Hour Comedy Hour and A&E's Comedy on the Road. The Chicago Tribune calls Mike, "One of the funniest and most talented performers to ever work in Chicago." For an evening of uncontrollable laughs, Mike Toomey is a sure choice!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Jeff Capri uses his cynical perspective to riff on oxygen bars, playing darts to get in shape, and men taking their shirts off before fights.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Mike Goodwin: WhatchaNotGoneDo Is Not Laugh At These Jokes!
programme.desc: A southern gentleman with a curious mind, love for people, and heart for God, Mike Goodwin is in a class all his own.

programme.title: Larry the Cable Guy: Remain Seated
programme.desc: Larry the Cable Guy from the Blue Collar Comedy tour stars in his first solo stand-up special.

programme.title: Gallagher Overboard
programme.desc: Featuring Gallagher's most elaborate staging, and imaginative use of props, he really did go Overboard when he did this one.

programme.title: Fatimah Taliah: Nice To Meet Me
programme.desc: Fatimah Taliah talks about getting to know herself during the 2020 pandemic lockdown.

programme.title: Gary Owen Breakin' Out the Park
programme.desc: In this brutally honest stand-up performance Owen confesses his hilarious history of growing up in and around trailer parks.

programme.title: Gary Owen: Black Famous
programme.desc: From catching COVID to running out of shows to watch, this special is full of riotously funny real life stories you've come to expect from Gary.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents Plastic Cup Boyz
programme.desc: Joey Wells, Will Spank Horton, and Na'im Lynn take the stage in this comedy special taped at the House of Blues in San Diego.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents Keith Robinson
programme.desc: Keith Robinson brings his in-your-face style to everything from the moment he stopped liking his own son to the real reason why Obama was elected.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this horror classic about a dead little girl who has an evil clown doll that commands her to kill. That's all well and good. But it's the little things about Ghosthouse that really make you stand up and say “Wait, what?”

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the best way to set up a room. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Setting Up a Room!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 90's horror classic where a young babysitter is stalked by a mysterious stranger! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (former stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 aka MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Whereas most slasher movies choose elderly, saggy retirement community members as their victims, The House on Sorority Row turns the genre upside down by instead murdering a bunch of attractive sorority girls! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: Grand Isle
programme.desc: Walter (Nicolas Cage) and his neglected wife lure a young man into their Victorian home to escape a hurricane. When the man is charged with murder by Det. Jones (Kelsey Grammar), he must reveal the couple's wicked secrets to save himself.

programme.title: Lavalantula
programme.desc: Volcanic eruptions in LA unleash a horde of gigantic, lava-breathing tarantulas.

programme.title: Phantom Racer
programme.desc: Seventeen years ago, McCullough perished in a fiery crash and his rival Sawyer was to blame. When Sawyer becomes the prime suspect in a series of murders, he realizes he's not the only one in danger.

programme.title: Shark Lake
programme.desc: Action legend Dolph Lundgren goes head-to-head with a blood thirsty shark that has a resort town under siege. As bodies wash up on the lake's shore an ex-con (Lundgren) must take matters in to his own hands to protect his daughter.

programme.title: Tragedy Girls
programme.desc: A twist on the slasher genre, following two death-obsessed teenage girls who use their online show about real-life tragedies to send their small mid-western town into a frenzy, and cement their legacy as modern horror legends.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: A hitman tries to retire, but a beautiful thief may change his plans.

programme.title: Stonewall (2015)
programme.desc: Passions and politics make a volatile mix in this dynamic drama directed by Roland Emmerich that follows the events that led to the birth of the modern Gay Rights movement.

programme.title: Alice Upside Down
programme.desc: Alice Upside Down is the story of an 11-year-old girl who has just moved to a suburb of Washington, D.C. with her father Ben and her 17-year-old brother Lester.

programme.title: Letters to Juliet
programme.desc: In modern Verona, where women seeking their Romeos leave letters to Juliet, a young writer (Amanda Seyfried) finds a life-altering 50-year-old letter.

programme.title: Booksmart
programme.desc: BOOKSMART is a comedy about two academic superstars and best friends on a mission to cram four years of fun into one night.

programme.title: Tragedy Girls
programme.desc: A twist on the slasher genre, following two death-obsessed teenage girls who use their online show about real-life tragedies to send their small mid-western town into a frenzy, and cement their legacy as modern horror legends.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: A hitman tries to retire, but a beautiful thief may change his plans.

programme.title: The Nature of Romance
programme.desc: A busy travel writer goes glamping at a state park with her best friend and finds herself falling in love with one of the park rangers.

programme.title: The Little Hours
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, a young servant fleeing from his master takes refuge at a convent full of emotionally unstable nuns. Introduced as a deaf mute man, he must fight to hold his cover as the nuns try to resist temptation.

programme.title: Jeffrey
programme.desc: This romantic comedy centers on the chaotic love life of Jeffrey, a gay man who swears off sex only to fall in love with his ideal man. Jeffrey's vow of chastity is inspired by a fear of AIDS, a prospect which has started to terrify him so much that he decides he'd be better off never making love again. He is happy and relieved for a time, until he meets Steve, a handsome, charming dreamboat who also happens to be HIV-positive. Jeffrey wants nothing more than to be with Steve, but his anxiety over the disease and fear of commitment stand in the way.

programme.title: A Strange Brand Of Happy
programme.desc: An aimless bachelor loses his job and finds himself chasing the same girl as his manipulative ex-boss.

programme.title: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Sequel to Autumn in the Vineyard.

programme.title: Summer in the City
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A midwestern girl tries to adopt a big city personality with disastrous results.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The POstables explore the mystery of true love as they deliver divorce papers.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The POstables are on a mission to deliver a soldier's letter from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. The whole town anxiously awaits the impending blooming of the Middleton.

programme.title: Dead On Campus
programme.desc: College should have been the best time of Natalie's life.

programme.title: Sins in the Suburbs
programme.desc: As news of a local serial killer begins to spread, Heather questions a neighbor.

programme.title: Soccer Mom Madam
programme.desc: After a bitter breakup, Anna goes to work at a massage parlor.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: Cellmate Secrets is an unfiltered perspective on well-known true-crime stories. Casey Anthony's former jail mate reveals how the two forged a deep friendship.

programme.title: Dead On Campus
programme.desc: College should have been the best time of Natalie's life.

programme.title: Freelancers
programme.desc: When Malo joins the NYPD, he is taken in by his murdered father's old partner and a team of rogue cops.

programme.title: Line of Duty
programme.desc: A disgraced cop finds himself in a race to find a kidnap victim whose abductor he accidentally killed.

programme.title: Fatale
programme.desc: A wild one-night stand plunges a sports agent into a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a police detective.

programme.title: The Babysitter's Seduction
programme.desc: Michelle starts working for a wealthy family. But, when the wife is found dead, Michelle becomes a suspect.

programme.title: The Kings of Summer
programme.desc: The Kings Of Summer, is a unique coming-of-age comedy about three teenage friends - Joe, Patrick, and the eccentric Biaggio- who, in the ultimate act of independence, decide to spend their summer building a house in the woods and living off the land.

programme.title: Explorers
programme.desc: In their makeshift laboratory, three boys use an amazing discovery and their ingenuity to build their own spaceship and launch themselves on a fantastic interplanetary journey.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In hopes of wooing a girl, Tristan promises to bring her a falling star. He soon discovers the star is actually a celestial beauty named Yvaine. When an old witch, Lamia attempts to steal Yvaine?s youth, Tristan must protect her.

programme.title: Whitney
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the life and music of Whitney Houston.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides
programme.desc: A group of male friends become obsessed with five sisters who are sheltered by their religious parents.

programme.title: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: A spiritual woman embarks on a dangerous quest with a convicted killer.

programme.title: Crooked House
programme.desc: Based on the Agatha Christie novel by the same name, a spy-turned-private-detective is lured by his former lover to catch her grandfather's murderer before Scotland Yard exposes dark family secrets.

programme.title: Runaway (1984)
programme.desc: A cop of the future, an evil genius and a murderous robotic force in a deadly chase of runaway terror.

programme.title: The Lazarus Project
programme.desc: A harrowing and frightening thriller about a man who has everything he's ever loved stripped away from him and to earn his life and family back, he must face obstacles of mystical origins, endure countless tests of his faith, struggle with his own sanity, and explore the depth and the power of his soul.

programme.title: It Should Happen To You
programme.desc: A publicity-hungry actress uses a Manhattan billboard to jumpstart her career.

programme.title: Who Was That Lady?
programme.desc: A chemistry professor and a TV writer become embroiled with the FBI and loads of trouble when they pretend to be spies to fool one of their wives.

programme.title: Doctor Faustus
programme.desc: An aging scholar sells his soul to the devil in exchange for youth, knowledge and power.

programme.title: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Movie producer Granger is bored in his marriage to Reed. He has an affair with Canale, a temperamental actress, but decides he prefers Reed's company. After he dumps Canale, detective tells him that the star has been stabbed, and all clues point toward Granger as the killer.

programme.title: In Harms Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger's epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: Island In The Sky
programme.desc: Set after World War II, John Wayne plays Dooley, a former army pilot flying transport missions, who is forced to crash-land his fuel-starved plane on a frozen lake after it strays from its course.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: This Island Earth
programme.desc: Two researchers are pressed into service by battle-weary aliens on the brink of losing an interplanetary war.

programme.title: Moonrise Kingdom
programme.desc: The story of two 12-year-olds who fall in love, make a secret pact, and run away together into the wilderness.

programme.title: The Killers
programme.desc: An insurance investigator pieces together the events that led up to a boxer's murder.

programme.title: RT Exclusive Interviews
programme.desc: Bill Hader and the cast of Barry discuss what's to come in season three.

programme.title: RT Essentials
programme.desc: If there's anything Hollywood loves, it's Hollywood. These are the greatest movies about Hollywood ever.

programme.title: Rotten Tomatoes is Wrong (Podcast)
programme.desc: Comedian Hal Rudnick tells us why he thinks critics are wrong about the 2008 comedy 'Step Brothers.'

programme.title: Remember Yesterday
programme.desc: When Jenny's childhood sweetheart comes to town, old jealousies are forgiven and Jenny gets 2 second chances.

programme.title: The Score
programme.desc: The Score boldly combines real time heist-thriller suspense with offbeat romance and a killer soundtrack.

programme.title: The Republic of Two
programme.desc: An examination of the high-stakes game of premarital cohabitation. Tim wants to be a doctor. Caroline doesn't quite know what she wants.

programme.title: Lust For Love
programme.desc: Astor spoils his one chance at love with his lifelong crush, Mila. Convinced he needs help to win her back, he engages her ex-best friend to teach him how to woo women.

programme.title: My Daddy is In Heaven
programme.desc: Becca and Adam Smith along with their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragedy strikes

programme.title: A Royal Makeover
programme.desc: When Ramone discovers he is about to be King, he takes lessons from royal expert Angelica.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Liz and the Kappa Psi Psi prepare for the Gamma Fair. Liz receives the T-shirts she ordered to sell to raise money. The Gamma guys are busy, too, even with Pete underfoot. Joe gives Pete a task that is a little too much for him to handle. Meanwhile, Alan has inspired Anna in his Women's Lit class to change her appearance in hopes of catching a guy like Alan. Professor Presser is not impressed.

programme.title: The Perfect Mate
programme.desc: After Hope's fiancé breaks up with her, platonic friend Jesse acts as a stand in to meet her parents.

programme.title: Food for the Heart
programme.desc: After taking on too much with her meal delivery service, Lia accepts her neighbor Eli's help.

programme.title: The Tender Trap
programme.desc: The true story of Sharon Armstrong, Kiwi grandmother and public servant, who became the victim of an online romance scam that almost cost her her freedom.

programme.title: A Lover Betrayed
programme.desc: Inspired by true events. A one-night romance with a handsome soldier turns Tess Ford's life upside down as his attraction to her becomes a frightening obsession.

programme.title: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: A mother's overpowering aspirations turn deadly, estranging her forever from the daughter whose life she sought to control in this bone-chilling tale of obsession.

programme.title: Miracle on Christmas
programme.desc: During the Christmas Family, Mary (Erin Bethea) experiences emotional trials that cause her to question her faith until a visitor (Brett Varvel) arrives and her husband (Jason Burkey) receives an unexpected miracle.

programme.title: Obsessed
programme.desc: Secret and passionate affair between Colonel Jin Pyeong, trapped in a loveless marriage with Soo Jin, and Jong Ga Heun, the Chinese-Korean wife of Captain Kyung Woo Jin happens in the summer of 1969.

programme.title: Pipeline
programme.desc: Korea has over 1,200km of pipeline that acts as the country's artery. There are several individuals who make the headlines by tapping into this network in order to siphon oil. Drill-bit is a drilling prodigy who is offered by Gun-woo, the head of an oil refining company, a large sum of money for completing the impossible heist to drill into the pipeline between Honam and Seoul-Busan highway within a month. To get the job done in time, he puts together a team of misfits: civil engineer ‘Mr. Na', excavation expert ‘Big Shovel', and welding expert ‘Welder'.

programme.title: Urban Myths
programme.desc: 10 different urban tales will take you into the realm of darkness where myth and reality become blurred.

programme.title: The Name
programme.desc: Ri-ae buys the painting of Cheol-woo and they decide to complete the last work by borrowing each other's name.

programme.title: When It Rains
programme.desc: While Todd is away at Graduate school to better his family, his wife Janice is back home taking care of her sick mother. The long distance marriage takes a toll on the two. When Todd ends up encountering a woman named Sharon at a bar, sparks fly.

programme.title: Weekend Getaway
programme.desc: Dangerous secrets are revealed when three happily married couples go to a cabin in the woods for one weekend.

programme.title: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Local sheriff, Keith James, finds himself on a desperate hunt for vengeance after the loss of his brother. While solving the case, the truth about his past is revealed, making him and his daughter targets.

programme.title: The Hanged Man
programme.desc: The astonishing true story of Ron Van Clief, the first black martial arts movie star, known as "The Black Dragon". His determination to win — despite horrific odds — exacts a heavy toll and his life becomes a roller coaster ride with spectacular highs, devastating lows, and more than a few cliff-hangers.

programme.title: The Green Grass
programme.desc: When money, success, and power becomes your platform it undoubtedly attracts an audience of onlookers some of who will stop at nothing to get a taste of the good life. But as the plot thickens and the heat intensifies, Shawn's credibility will most certainly be challenged. He'll need to dig deep within himself to stop his life from spinning wildly out of control. This thrilling drama will test his limits as he struggles to find the balance between who he is and who he imagines himself to be. And in the aftermath he'll count up the cost of The Green Grass.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: The Alternate
programme.desc: The president is kidnapped while attending a charity event. Initially planned by his chief of staff to boost his poll ratings, one of the kidnappers decides the opportunity for gain is too strong and it turns into a real kidnapping. Starring Ice-T.

programme.title: Avenging Angelo
programme.desc: When elderly Mafia boss Angelo (Anthony Quinn) gets killed in a restaurant, his loyal bodyguard, Frankie (Sylvester Stallone), decides he must protect Angelo's daughter -- high-strung socialite Jennifer (Madeleine Stowe) -- who may also be in danger. Jennifer, however, doesn't even realize that Angelo is her father, as he gave her up for adoption years ago. After Frankie tells her the truth, she sets out to avenge Angelo's death with a very shaky understanding of Mafia protocol.

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant: Port Of New Orleans
programme.desc: Terence McDonagh (Nicolas Cage) isn't doing so well. He has a nasty painkiller addiction, courtesy of an injury he sustained while rescuing a prisoner during Hurricane Katrina. Plus, there's his alcoholic father (Tom Bower), boozy wife (Jennifer Coolidge) and prostitute girlfriend (Eva Mendes). And, he's just been saddled with a rookie partner (Shawn Hatosy). Now Terence must pull himself back from the edge of insanity to investigate a series of murders that has the city on edge.

programme.title: Nowhere to Land
programme.desc: After deadly nerve gas is planted on a plane, a pilot must safely land a 747 between Hawaii and LA: the longest flying stretch without a place to land in emergencies. Starring Jack Wagner.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant: Port Of New Orleans
programme.desc: Terence McDonagh (Nicolas Cage) isn't doing so well. He has a nasty painkiller addiction, courtesy of an injury he sustained while rescuing a prisoner during Hurricane Katrina. Now Terence must pull himself back from the edge of insanity to investigate a series of murders that has the city on edge.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses
programme.desc: With over 100 million albums sold, the world's most dangerous band returns for this historic Sin City takeover! Legendary Rock Band Guns N' Roses have taken the desert by storm and laid claim on Las Vegas' Hard Rock Casino. This absolute ambush on the city of sin, captured in High Definition, puts you in the best seat in the house for an electrifying once in a lifetime live concert performance. Filmed during GNR's Appetite For Democracy residency at The Joint in November 2012, celebrating twenty-five years of "Appetite for Destruction"and four years of "Chinese Democracy", in this elaborate Vegas style production featuring Rock Icon Axl Rose at the top of his game with his current lineup performing some of GNR's biggest hits including "Welcome To The Jungle", "Sweet Child Of Mine", "Mr Brownstone", "November Rain", "Chinese Democracy", "Knockin On Heaven's Door", "Nightrain", 'Civil War", McCartney's "Live And Let Die", "Paradise City", and many more hard rockin hits! This is the first live concert release from Guns N' Roses with it's newest lineup, since Use Your Illusion II in 1992 with GNR's original members. Sin City will never be the same.

programme.title: Paul Rodgers

programme.title: Paul Simon
programme.desc: During the first leg of Paul Simon's triumphant, 2011 U.S. tour, he thrilled hometown fans with a special club performance at New York City's historic Webster Hall. The show presents this iconic artist working at the peak of his artistic and creative powers in an unusually intimate setting. The 20-song, 90-minute set list was drawn from his legendary career and includes several songs that haven't been performed live in many years. "Kodachrome," "Mother and Child Reunion," "Gone At Last" and "The Obvious Child" are just some of the highlights as well as songs from Simon's most recent album, 2011's So Beautiful or So What (Hear Music/Concord Music Group) including "Dazzling Blue," "Rewrite," "The Afterlife" and the album's propulsive title track.

programme.title: Cocinísima

programme.title: Especiales del Once
programme.desc: Especiales del Once - Los Monstruos de Guillermo Del Toro: Estas son criaturas surgidas de la imaginación, entre las que podemos encontrar: cráneos, fetos y tentáculos. Conoce la colección e inspiración de toda una vida.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Catalina le dice a Adolfo que le queda poco tiempo de vida y le pide que la lleve a ciudad Santiago con su madrina. José María le dice a Josefina que se casará, pero que no habrá festejo.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Necesitas ayuda
programme.desc: El padre le informa a Maricruz que tiene que desalojar el rancho lo antes posible José Antonio se encuentra con Octavio y le informa que Maricruz se va a casar con Álvaro.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Problemas familiares
programme.desc: Sofía le reclama a Rodrigo por alejar a su familia por culpa de Gaviota, él le exige no entrometerse en su vida. Alonso hace un brindis por Gaviota y asegura que es una mujer increíble, ella se pone nerviosa al escuchar sus palabras.

programme.title: Teresa: Falsa amistad
programme.desc: A Mayra se le rompe el corazón al descubrir que Rubén y Genoveva son amantes. Teresa engaña a Fernando diciéndole que está comenzando a enamorarse de él.

programme.title: Rubí: Un nuevo proyecto
programme.desc: Alejandro llega a Cancún y se encuentra con su hermana Sofía y sus papás Don Genaro se enfurece al ver que Luis y Sofía juntos y cree que puede ser descubierto.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Traición y amor
programme.desc: Juan le confiesa a Sofía que nunca ha dejado de amarla, pero ella ya no puede creer en él. Óscar le cuenta a Jimena todo lo relacionado con su divorcio. Fernando decide llevarse lejos a Gabriela para que sus nervios no los delaten.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Intrigas dolorosas
programme.desc: Durante una cena con Hugo y Alejandro, Florencia confiesa que vio a Mili besando a su esposo. Andrea y Karla le hacen creer a Valeria que Luciana sabe de su noviazgo con Rocky. Hugo y Alejandro vuelven a enfrentarse por el amor de Mili.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Trágica muerte
programme.desc: Fernanda cree que por fin tendrá una familia ahora que David se casará con Graciela. Por otro lado, Brian intenta defender a Marta y Carito de unos maleantes y algo malo sucede.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Catalina le dice a Adolfo que le queda poco tiempo de vida y le pide que la lleve a ciudad Santiago con su madrina. José María le dice a Josefina que se casará, pero que no habrá festejo.

programme.title: María Mercedes: Terrible accidente
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a Meche que se con él. La madrina de Mística le aconseja que se case con don Sebastián para tener mucho dinero y prestigio. Meche teme que su hermano muera debido a que necesita un tipo de sangre difícil de conseguir.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio conoce a su hija y está decidido a ayudar a Marimar Arturo le confiesa a su mamá y a su hermana que se va a casar.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio descubre que Bella es Marimar y le exige una explicación, pues es el padre de la hija de ella. Bella le dice al gobernador que se casará con él.

programme.title: María Mercedes: Terrible accidente
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a Meche que se con él. La madrina de Mística le aconseja que se case con don Sebastián para tener mucho dinero y prestigio. Meche teme que su hermano muera debido a que necesita un tipo de sangre difícil de conseguir.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio conoce a su hija y está decidido a ayudar a Marimar Arturo le confiesa a su mamá y a su hermana que se va a casar.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio descubre que Bella es Marimar y le exige una explicación, pues es el padre de la hija de ella. Bella le dice al gobernador que se casará con él.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Nandito duda de que María lo haya querido salvar y piensa que es una asesina. Soraya confronta a María en la cárcel para provocarla y acusarla de haberla querido matar también. María le reprocha a Luis Fernando su infidelidad.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: La compañera de celda de María resulta ser Penélope, quien empieza a hacerle la vida miserable. Soraya trata de convencer a Luis Fernando que María y Nandito solo querían hacerle daño.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rosaura sospecha que Ana Paula está buscando la manera de separarse de Rogelio. Rogelio le pide a Ana Paula una oportunidad para conocerse y llevarse mejor.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Justino intenta matar a Antonia al saber que estaba esperando un hijo de él. Violeta le pide a Mariano que le permita volver a vivir en su casa. Maximiliano siente celos al saber que José María está intentado enamorar a Violeta.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Jesusa le pide a José María que la lleve con Antonia y su familia. Violeta le confiesa a Antonia de las amenazas de Justino y le propone regresar con los Lazcano. Violeta confronta a Julio sobre el trato que hizo con Justino.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Jesusa se reencuentra con Antonia y le da la noticia de que Alejandro rentó su casa. Julio le reclama a Justino que solo lo quiere ayudar porque está interesado en Antonia y esto le trae problemas con Malena. Julio le pide perdón a Antonia.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Justino plena deshacerse de Alejandro, pero Pantaleón se niega a hacerle daño. Leonora accede a que los Madrigal regresen a su casa. Violeta le externa a Max las dudas que tiene acerca de su relación, pero él vuelve a convencerla que la ama.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ana Paula recuerda los bellos momentos que pasó al lado de Gustavo, mientras se prepara para casarse con Rogelio. Efraín le pide a Cynthia que acepte ser su pareja en la boda de Rogelio. Vanesa lleva a cabo sus planes para impedir la boda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rogelio le jura a Ana Paula que hará hasta lo imposible por hacerla feliz. Cynthia sospecha que Rogelio en verdad está enamorado de Ana Paula. Rogelio le exige a Bruno que se aleje de Ana Paula.

programme.title: Alborada: Pelea entre primos
programme.desc: Luis le reclama a Diego por mandarlo matar. Hipólita se entera cuál es el verdadero nombre de Luis. Por su parte, Luis le dice a Esperanza que quiere anular su matrimonio.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Problemas de dinero
programme.desc: Teresa le da información a Leonardo sobre los 5 millones de pesos. Leonardo investiga y confronta a José Luis sobre el dinero. Majo decide atrapar ella sola a Darío.

programme.title: La Gata: Terrible accidente
programme.desc: Esmeralda es atropellada por un hombre que le ofrece trabajo en su empresa. Por otro lado, Virginia le regala cosas a "Centavito" y Chayo. Además, Pablo le pide casamiento a Esmeralda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Celos dañinos
programme.desc: Esteban le confiesa a Rocío el gran interés que siente por ella. Efraín se molesta al saber que Consuelo es ahora novia de Hugo. Cynthia intenta suicidarse al pensar que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Espía en la oficina
programme.desc: Bruno piensa utilizar a Katia como espía en la oficina de Alex. Victoria comienza a enamorarse de Fernando. Paula consigue quedarse en casa de Alex. Alex visita a Meche y le pregunta sobre Pedro, pero ella niega conocerlo.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Un bebé para Florencia
programme.desc: Paloma sufre al saber que Gael se casará con Elisa. Sabrina le confiesa a Elisa que Paolo la había enamorado para conseguirle un bebé a Florencia.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Sacrificio de amor
programme.desc: Valentina le pide a José Miguel que evite encontrarse con Rosendo. Ivana se alegra al saber que, gracias a Toledo, Isabel podría quedar en libertad.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Instinto
programme.desc: Verónica llama a casa de Piedad y ella comienza a sospechar que Carlos Daniel siente algo por ella, pues él se emociona con la llamada. Estefanía disfruta de su nueva vida con Willy y su futuro bebé.

programme.title: El manantial: Balbuceos
programme.desc: El padre Salvador hace alusión a la otra hija de Francisca. Malena conversa con Alejandro sobre los sentimientos de su amiga.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor acepta tener una cita con una mujer casada y usa a Albertano para distraer a su amiga, pero el esposo de la mujer aparece y tienen que fingir tener una relación.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Dada su experiencia como chofer de microbuses, ahora que es rico, Vítor decide convertirse en piloto de carreras y, con Albertano, crea la escudería "Los Guapos".

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Los niños del barrio apedrean a Ofertín con Albertano dentro. El chino tiene una fiesta y doña Lucha invita a Nayeli. María va a un centro nocturno con sus amigas pero sus acompañantes las dejan con la cuenta.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa cambia el viejo refrigerador de Doña Lucha por uno de nueva tecnología y además parlante, lo cual vuelve loca a Lucha. Maria sorprende a Alberto acaramelado con Gloria y de celos inicia una competencia con Betsabé por un chico guapo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: El regreso de la Licha viviente
programme.desc: La tía Licha regresa de entre los muertos, donde en realidad nunca estuvo. Plácido la corre de la casa, pero la familia se apiada de ella.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Los López reordenan la casa cuando descubren que la tía Licha es su nueva vecina porque heredó el departamento contiguo. Plácido encuentra un nuevo empleo, en el que debe lidiar con una millenial déspota.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico son evaluados por una trabajadora social para verificar si son buenos padres Federica y Ludovico quieren tomar ventaja de que están solos para viajar a Hawai.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico se compromete a llevar a toda la familia al cine, pero las cosas no salen como esperaba y al final ninguno logra disfrutar la película.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco está muy triste porque lo despidieron de su trabajo por culpa de Emilia. Fran se enamora de Silvana, su psicóloga, y termina seduciéndola.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.sub-title: No me importa que me digan mujeriego
programme.desc: Paco regresa con Miranda, su exnovia, y la lleva a vivir a su casa. Todo va bien hasta que llega Lorena y el mundo se le viene abajo.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Los niños del barrio apedrean a Ofertín con Albertano dentro. El chino tiene una fiesta y doña Lucha invita a Nayeli. María va a un centro nocturno con sus amigas pero sus acompañantes las dejan con la cuenta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego se enoja con Tomás al descubrir que fue él quien dijo lo de su enema. Celina recrimina a Sol por alejar a Alan de ella. Diego confiesa que extraña a su mamá. Teo golpea a Gastón por maltratar a Jose. Rocco cree que Vico consume drogas.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Las chicas están en una reunión con la maestra Fátima, la cual dice que ella está para dirigirlas en su equipo de porristas sustituyendo a Alma.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta hace un plan para que José tenga una cita en el departamento de Diego y demostrarle a Teo que ya lo olvidó. Mía discute con su padre y él le dice que cambie esa cara pesada.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol le dice a Ana que si no ha visto a Celina, aprovecha también para decirle que ella está para servir en la escuela entonces le pide una orden de alimentos larga.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El papá de Rocco por fin conoce a su novia Victoria y le dice que se ve mejor sin sus lentes obscuros ya que es de mala educación tenerlos puestos y más si no hay rayos del sol.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Celina gana un concurso en el que participa en la radio y Pascual le dice que hay un tipo que pregunta por ella y resulta que es el cantante Ricardo Montaner.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Victoria llora en un pasillo de la escuela, a lo lejos. Mía se da cuenta y le dice que le cuente qué es lo que le pasa.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta entra al examen de Diego para distraer a la maestra de Literatura y la maestra le dice que es mentira lo que dice.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: María tiene que decirle a Juan Pablo que su papá murió. Finalmente, Cristóbal ve su esfuerzo cuando es elegido como nuevo director del colegio donde trabaja.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: Adolfo queda impactado con el cambio de María y por ello le pide Alejandro que rehaga su vida con ella y recupere a su hijo. Vanessa convence a los padres de familia de armar un alboroto en contra de Juan Pablo para cumplir su venganza contra él.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: Alejandro y María tienen una cita pero todo sale mal. Cristóbal va a la fiesta de Sonia y se emborracha.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: María teme que Alejandro descubra que Juan Pablo es su hijo y que al saberlo se lo quite. María se enfrenta a Alejandro y le deja en claro que no lo quiere cerca de ella ni de su hijo.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Los agentes de la policía encuentran el bote de veneno con el que mataron a Dante en el cuarto de Pilar. Por su parte, el médico le avisa a Gael que el corazón que tenía no es compatible con el de Gianna.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Fidel le dice a Eloísa que con la autopsia descubrieron que Dante fue envenenado y Pilar es la principal sospechosa. Fiorella le dice a Pedro que cree que está embarazada. Al mismo tiempo, se entera que podría ser hija de Sergio.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Federica es detenida por homicidio e intento de asesinato. Eloísa le dice a Gael que no lo quitará del testamento aunque no sea un Ángeles.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: El juez le dice a Federica que irá a la cárcel sin derecho a fianza. Por su lado, Eloísa le confiesa a Sergio que ella mató a Máximo. Pedro se alegra al enterarse que Fiorella es hija de Santino.

programme.title: El Chanfle II
programme.desc: El más extraño de los fanáticos del balompié, se ve envuelto en muchos enredos a causa de su honestidad.

programme.title: Las Golfas
programme.desc: Cuando despiden a Diana del cabaret donde trabaja, Luis la aloja desinteresadamente. Sin embargo, cuando intentan escapar de un traficante de drogas, los problemas los siguen.

programme.title: Cuando tejen las arañas
programme.desc: Una muchacha vive un proceso de degradación rodeada por seres que han perdido la noción de los valores morales.

programme.title: Chanoc
programme.desc: Chanoc vuelve a arriesgar una vez más su vida, en un mar repleto de tiburones para combatir a grupo de contrabandistas.

programme.title: Una golfa
programme.desc: Una prostituta es echada de un cabaret, un músico la aloja en su casa y siempre la respeta porque es su enamorado.

programme.title: La Fuerza de los Humildes
programme.desc: El dueño de una fábrica, amenazada por una huelga, intenta sobornar al líder de los obreros sin conseguir nada.

programme.title: Muñecos infernales
programme.desc: Tres jóvenes roban un ídolo en Haití que encierra una maldición. Luego, se lo muestran a unos especialistas en ciencias ocultas que ya conocen la historia del objeto y los secretos que esconde.

programme.title: Amor Y Pecado
programme.desc: El dramático encuentro entre dos hermanos que se enamoran de la misma mujer, quien los rescató de un orfanatorio.

programme.title: Después de la tormenta
programme.desc: Dos hermanos gemelos dirigen un faro, pero uno está enamorado de la mujer del otro. Un día, los hermanos salen a pescar y solo uno de ellos regresa para, después, suplantar la identidad del hermano desaparecido.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Ama a quien no te ama, responde a quien no te llama, y andarás carrera vana
programme.desc: Isa es una adolescente que está dispuesta a todo por amor, incluso a someterse al abuso y a la humillación. Ella se enamora de Gabriel, un chico irresponsable y grosero que la utiliza solo para que le haga sus trabajos de escuela.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale poco y bueno, que mucho y malo
programme.desc: La pobre de María padece una grave enfermedad. Sin embargo, en su corazón no existe lugar para el dolor.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Los dichos de los viejitos, son evangelios chiquitos
programme.desc: Desde que murió su madre, Lili fue criada por su abuela, y por no escuchar sus consejos, se aprovecharán de su inocencia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Jaulas y cárceles ni para los ángeles
programme.desc: Una joven cumple su condena dentro de una prisión para mujeres, junto a su hijo de seis años. Debido a los lineamientos de la institución, la joven se ve obligada a pedirle a su comadre, que se haga cargo de su hijo.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: This is the new Bugatti Tourbillon, the successor to the Veyron and the Chiron, due to be delivered in 2026. Its looks are very much evolution rather than revolution but unlike its predecessors the Tourbillon doesn't have a turbocharged W16 engine, instead it has a naturally aspirated, 8.3-litre V16 developed with Cosworth. This produces 1000hp on its own but in conjunction with three electric motors the Tourbillon has a combined hybrid system output of 1800hp (1775bhp).As you can hear in this video, it is a pretty incredible sounding engine, revving to 9000rpm. It's a distinctive sound too and for comparison we've included the soundtracks of a couple of its naturally aspirated hypercar rivals - the 6.5-litre V12 from the Aston Martin Valkyrie and the 3.9-litre V12 from the GMA T.50 (both also developed with Cosworth).Bugatti's Director of Design, Frank Heyl, talks Henry Catchpole around all the fascinating exterior details of the 3.8mIllion Euro Tourbillon but we think the interior is perhaps even more spectacular. With clear influence and inspiration taken from mechanical watches the titanium dials are wonders to behold. The steering wheel is pretty crazy too…And talking of watches, the car's name, Tourbillon, means whirlwind in French, but it is a word widely associated with a complicated mechanism found in watches. As Henry explains, with the help of a Ulysse Nardin, it was invented in 1795 to negate the impact of gravity and improve the accuracy of timekeeping in pocket watches.Of course, this being a Bugatti, it is incredibly fast, with a top speed of 276mph (445kph). It is also capable of 0-62mph in 2sec, 0-124mph in under 5sec, 0-186mph in under 10sec and 0-248mph in under 25sec. But in the age of the hyper EV and cars like the the Bugatti's cousin, the Rimac Nevera, pure performance doesn't seem to carry the sway that it once did, so where does that leave the Tourbillon? Catchpole thinks that the answer can be found in the quartz crisis of the 1970s and what followed.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Explore the downsides of custom building as Mike tours a headache of a house.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: A tile supply company had been given a rubber cheque by a contractor for ceramic floor tiles. An effort to locate the contractor brought them to the doorstep of the homeowner, who was having the tile installed in their home. The tile supplier was told that the contractor had abandoned the job weeks earlier and disappeared, also leaving them with a half completed kitchen and badly installed tiles. Disgusted by the poor workmanship and saddened by the emotional state of the homeowners, the tile supplier offered that he would try and figure out a way to help them. They called Mike Holmes and offered to donate all new materials if Holmes On Homes would do the installation. Inspired by this act of generosity, Mike and the team roll up their sleeves to make it all come together- and complete the unfinished kitchen as well.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Living in a century home, Kjirsten and John had their bathroom remodeled with a custom slate tile shower, featuring built-in bench seating. Soon afterwards, they notice a strange substance leaching out of the tile grout and that the shower doesn't drain properly. When the bathroom ceiling starts to peel away, they realize something is wrong below the surface. Mike confirms their beautiful looking, new slate shower, is only skin deep.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Lisa and Simon were preparing to have their first baby and needed to build a nursery and a bathroom. They found a reputable contractor at a home show with impressive credentials and long list of references. A contract was drafted, a substantial down payment was paid, and the 6-week job would be starting almost immediately. Over the next four months, every excuse was given why they could not start the job. With the realization that they may not have a properly functioning full bathroom, and a new born due in three months- Lisa and Simon fired the contractor- and called Mike Holmes. Time is ticking, with a baby on the way, and a bathroom and nursery that will need to be built again. Mike and the team race to beat the Stork!

programme.title: What's For Sale?

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores the hip side of Athens with a local foodie, then invites her into the kitchen for a taste and talk of Athens. We catch a glimpse of the way locals live in the city. In the kitchen, Diane pays homage to modern traditions by reinventing a few classics. She makes a pastitsio with wonton wrappers, cauliflower and feta, and, enjoys the Greek dessert that she and her friend make together.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Every region of Greece has its own unique character and cuisine, and today Diane visits Nemea and Argos, home to some of Greece's most famous wines and dishes. Together with a village cook, she learns to make a homemade local pasta dish and a cheesy skillet pie. Back in the kitchen, she prepares an easy sauteed spinach and orange recipe, braised pork with cabbage, and cookies made with olive oil.

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul cooks four great recipes, Carpaccio of Fresh Kenmare Bay Scallops, Spatchcocked sweet chilli Chicken with warm wraps, Pan fried quail with chargrilled baby gem lettuce and A White Chocolate Risotto. Paul shows you how to remove the entire ribcage of the chicken and also how to perfectly butcher a quail.

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul shows you in this episode that with simple techniques and perfect seasoning, you can create amazing recipes at home with easy to find ingredients. If you can't find one type of pasta, just use another. If you see something you like, just add it in to your favourite recipe. That's the beauty of food – There are no limitations as to what you can cook!!

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul shows you how to cook incredible Lamb and Fennel seed skewers A Classic soup with Goats Cheese Scones A surprise little dish using up leftovers and the most amazing rice dish you'll ever see. All this plus loads of fun along the way in this episode of Treyvaud's Kitchen.

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: If you blink you'll miss the first dish!! The fastest and tastiest cooked salmon recipe. A fantastic Portabello Mushroom recipe that both vegetarians and meat eaters will both love. Bruschetta three different ways and finished off with a stunning Mediterranean Pork dish is what is in store throughout this episode of Treyvaud's Kitchen

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, Paul shows you how to cook an amazing dinner party recipe when he stuffs a whole Haddock, Jamaican style. A really quick sweet chilli chicken salad and then Treyvaud's epic steak sandwich with a Flambé you'll have to see to believe. And to finish off the show, a simple but incredible Plum tart.

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul teaches you the history and the anatomy of Venison before cooking a mouth-watering salad with venison loin, pear and blue cheese. Then a great family dinner with Paul's take on Chicken Parmesan. And after showing you just how simple it is to cook Monkfish, Paul finishes the show off with his amazing take on an old Irish classic Bread and Butter Pudding!!

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels
programme.desc: Treyvaud travels to Enniskillen to meet Pat O'Doherty and his famous pigs. Paul is given a master class in butchery and then travels by boat to see the world famous ‘black bacon' pigs run wild on their very own private island!

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels
programme.desc: Treyvaud travels to the mighty Thomond Park to cook on the pitch of Munster RFC and meets world rugby legend Doug Howlett. Then it's off to the stunning Adare Village where Paul meets up with his old pal Wade Murphy of 1826 Restaurant.

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels

programme.title: That's Disrespectful
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice. Do they attempt to reclaim a burnt-out husk of a car from its high-flying owners, or do they just give up and go home?

programme.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Missed Dates
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands, when they decide to haul away both a stripped-down husk of a car and the phone number of its owner's coquettish and bathrobe-wearing ex-girlfriend. Finally, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah head way out into the country to wrangle with a case of mistaken identity and a trio of shotgun-wielding cultists.

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer wearing an unexpected outfit. And finally, the whole team heads out to repo more than six cars from an insolvent dealership, with the fate of their leader still in question.

programme.title: Segway This Way
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter. Hopefully, one of them knows how to ride that thing. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Froy crash a house-party to claim a Civic from an out-of-control wannabe gangster.

programme.title: The Canals of Deceit
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt when a posse of soccer players get physical to protect their precious and unpaid-for Camaro

programme.title: Captain Lou
programme.desc: First, Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep, but when Matt's buttons get pushed, some bikes might get broken. Then, Froy and Sonia negotiate with a sensible debtor who's more trouble than she seems... or is she? And finally, Lou, Sonia, and Froy hit the open water to repo a luxury yacht - but first they'll have to wrangle with a surly sea captain, not to mention the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Incompetent and Unfaithful
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league championship softball team. And finally, Froy and Sonia stumble into a bizarre love triangle when it turns out their car is owned by the sugar-daddy of a cheating spouse.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

Actor Anderson Cooper joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss the latest headlines and his new book, “Vanderbilt: The Rise and Fall of an American Dynasty.” Plus, meet Drew-Gooder Brooke Johns, an ER nurse who volunteers to braid patients' hair on her days off. Then, Drew is celebrating the upcoming NYC Marathon with marathoner and chef Dan Churchill who whips up a healthy fried rice dish.

programme.title: The Wolfpack
programme.desc: THE WOLFPACK is a coming of age story following the six Angulo brothers who have spent their entire lives locked away from society in an apartment on the Lower East Side of Manhattan. All they know of the outside world is gleaned from the films they watch obsessively and recreate meticulously, using elaborate homemade props and costumes. For years this has served as a productive way to stave off loneliness – but when one of the brothers escapes, everything changes. Directed by Crystal Moselle.

programme.title: The YouTube Effect
programme.desc: Director Alex Winter explores the ascension and acceleration of YouTube, a video-sharing website that started with humble origins and has gone on to change how we experience the world. With exclusive access to some of YouTube's biggest stars, the film presents an eye-opening and troubling look at the platform now so powerfully embedded in our lives.

programme.title: Blackfish
programme.desc: Killer whales are beloved, majestic, friendly giants, yet infamous for their capacity to kill viciously. BLACKFISH unravels the complexities of this dichotomy, employing the story of the notorious performing whale Tilikum, who — unlike any orca in the wild — has taken the lives of several people while in captivity. BLACKFISH expands on the discussion of keeping such intelligent creatures in captivity. Directed by Gabriela Cowperthwaite.

programme.title: After Skid Row
programme.desc: After Skid Row documents the journey of Barbie Carter as she navigates the transition to housed life following the brutal reality of a decade on the streets. Her unique story and compelling character help to both demystify and deeply personalize a homelessness epidemic that continues to swell across Los Angeles. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: Wildfire
programme.desc: Nicola is a natural winemaker living in a remote village near Crotone, where his atavistic pursuit of wine is under active siege from climate related wildfires and the prolonged dry seasons. For Nicola, and other winemakers like him, this environmental change has existential consequences it threatens his livelihood. “Wildfire” patiently observes Nicola in this affective state of anxiety—as the wildfire grows within him—as he's forced to alter the course of his harvest in real time. Directed by Andree Ljutica.

programme.title: The Adventure of America's Horses
programme.desc: These iconic American horses opened up routes through a continent and conquered its plains and unspoiled heart. Today, these untamed horses are fighting for their freedom and even their very survival in the wide open spaces of the American West. But who is aware that these present-day Mustangs are first and foremost the guardians of an unheralded heritage? That of the horses of the New World. This is an epic story, nearly 500 years old, and we have chosen to tell it through an exceptional journey, akin to that taken by the horses themselves.

programme.title: Lynx
programme.desc: May I introduce myself: my name is Lynx. I have a short tail and characteristic tufts of black hair on the tips of my ears. Usually I'm very shy but still quite curious of the world around me. This is why I discovered the 15 cameras that have been set up in the Bohemian forest to catch all my activities with their sensors. With the help of local rangers they know where to find me and my friends when we go out for a hunt at night, or even in the intimate hours during our mating season. The cameras also pick up my impressive athletic abilities I am capable of, such as my long leaps and my talent to remain unseen to my predators. Skills like these make me a great hunter, come see how I use them!

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: Uncommon and hardly known, today the Dugong is the most threatened sea mammal on the planet. The species can only be found in certain parts of the Indian Ocean and in the western regions of the Pacific. Off the coast of Mozambique, in the Bazaruto archipelago, Karen is on a mission to monitor this species and implement policies to bring it back from the brink of extinction.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: Meet Lena and Olya Esipovas, a formidable mother-daughter team based in Uzbekistan devoting their lives to saving the saiga – a critically endangered antelope with a distinctive bulbous nose. In 2015 an epidemic tragically wiped out half of the remaining population, killing over 200,000 animals in just a few days, making the work of Lena and Olya and their team of volunteers all the more urgent.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: The Kakapo, or owl parrot, is a large flightless bird found on two New Zealand islands: Codfish Island and Anchor Island. In the 1990s their numbers dropped to as low as 50 birds but this figure is now on the rise. Deidre Vercoe is responsible for running a conservation scheme which monitors each one of the remaining birds to keep them safe and to encourage them to breed.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.sub-title: Anna and the Thresher Sharks (The Philippines)
programme.desc: On the island of Malapascua in the Philippines, Anna Oposa and her team are working with local fisherman to create a nature reserve where thresher sharks can thrive. These sharks are famous for their long tails which they use to whip and stun their prey. Every day, pelagic thresher sharks head to Monad Shoal, a sunken island just off the coast of Malapascua, where other fish “clean” them of their external parasites. This remarkable sight is popular with divers but the numbers of thresher sharks are dwindling and Anna is spearheading the campaign to protect this incredible species in the Philippines.

programme.title: Nature's Survivors
programme.desc: Every year, the Earth is hit by cyclones, earthquakes, volcanoes and floods. These events make the headlines, with alarming human death toll numbers. But what about animals? This one-hour special explores how animals cope with natural disasters – before, during and after the events themselves. Animals have gone to great lengths to make the most out of some very perilous predicaments, and future climate change could force them to make even more changes in order to survive.

And why don't we all have them? | Richard Browning 3) The sustainable brilliance of Indigenous design | Manu Peni 4) How do you build a sacred space? | Siamak Hariri 5) Why do beavers build dams? | Glynnis Hood 6) Autofocusing reading glasses of the future | Nitish Padmanaban

programme.title: The Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Traveling to new destinations is always an experience. Insights and encouragement for you to think differently about the places you visit and the people you see. 1) The joy of surfing in ice-cold water | Chris Burkard 2) The largest river on Earth is actually in the sky | Iseult Gillespie 3) Gorgeous portraits of the world's vanishing people | Jimmy Nelson 4) A brief history of dumplings | Miranda Brown 5) 3 ways to make flying more climate-friendly | Ryah Whalen 6) What really happened to the Library of Alexandria? | Elizabeth Cox

programme.title: Climate Action, Now!
programme.desc: Get inspired to save the world with these dedicated minds and leaders tackling one of the biggest threats against modern civilization: climate change. 1) What the fossil fuel industry doesn't want you to know | Al Gore 2) An extreme weather report from America's weatherman | Al Roker 3) The wildly complex anatomy of a sneaker 4) A new social contract for global climate justice | Huma Yusuf

programme.title: Laugh and Learn
programme.desc: You won't just laugh out loud -- these speakers will make you think twice. 1) Anatomy of a New Yorker cartoon | Bob Mankoff 2) A scientific approach to the paranormal | Carrie Poppy 3) The history of the world according to cats - Eva-Maria Geigl 4) A pro wrestler's guide to confidence | Mike Kinney

programme.title: Close Up and Personal
programme.desc: Inspiring, life-affirming personal stories. 1) A mother and son's photographic journey through dementia | Tony Luciani 2) Why should you read Sylvia Plath? - Iseult Gillespie 3) The secret society of the Great Dismal Swamp | Dan Sayers 4) I grew up in the Westboro Baptist Church. Here's why I left | Megan Phelps-Roper 5) To overcome challenges, stop comparing yourself to others | Dean Furness

programme.title: Get Smart(er)
programme.desc: No matter the generation, these talks are perfect for bringing everyone together to learn, wonder and laugh. 1) Aliens built the pyramids and other absurdities of pseudo-archaeology | Sarah Kurnick 2) How architecture helped music evolve | David Byrne 3) Math is the hidden secret to understanding the world | Roger Antonsen 4) The mathematical secrets of Pascal's triangle | Wajdi Mohamed Ratemi 5) Why should you listen to Vivaldi's "Four Seasons"? - Betsy Schwarm

programme.title: The Future Ahead
programme.desc: Get an awe-inspiring look at the future that awaits with visionaries already predicting, embracing and innovating on the potential of tomorrow. 1) An ever-evolving map of everything on Earth | Jack Dangermond 2) How to stop the metaverse from becoming the internet's bad sequel | Micaela Mantegna 3) Can we create the "perfect" farm? | Brent Loken 4) Technology that knows what you're feeling | Poppy Crum 5) 3 ways to end a virus | TED-Ed 6) The radical possibilities of man-made DNA | Floyd E.
